title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Orochi, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Queen as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It only happens once a year...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Today is going to be fun!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's the fire festival!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AYAHA - Hahaha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Waha - Hahaha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The "Flower Capital".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only prosperous place in the whole of wano country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: behind the smiles of it's residents,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: lies a feelings of oppression and fear that they've lived with up until now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They're alive only because of their belief...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: that the Samuel of the Kozuki family...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Will someday help save their Homeland.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The reality, however, is that everyone was using that implausible legend...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: As a way of supporting their hearts.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How nice would it be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If today never ended.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After the festival ends, I won't be able to drink alcohol for another year, huh.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: DAM! It.....!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: IF ONLY KAIDS DIDN'T HAVE OROCHI'S BACK...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, what if the battle with the Kozuki family is happening right now, at this very moment!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They gather Samurai from all over the world to fight by their side!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On Onigashima, Orochi is cut down with Kaido in tow!! And then the whole island is in a frenzy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: splendid! Go crazy! Today we can dream as much as we want!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ha.... the water tastes great, doesn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What an extravagant day....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The air is clean - let's take in as much as we want!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No one will get killed today!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What a fantastic day this is!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Orochi will return once more but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: SING!! Dance!! Let's have fun today!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's the fire festival!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's danger- Ous, run away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't get caught!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't get cut!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What the hell is that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Argggh-hhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just as I thought, so it's the "Plague"!!

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: QUEEN...!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 38 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
